metric_value: Create corporate agreement about midline category value and messaging to support Maxtor's aggressive foundation of the category to ensure continued profitability
notes: Primary stated purpose of the workshop

metric_value: February 13 2004; Maxtor Corporation 333 South Street Shrewsbury MA
Stephen DiFranco, Mike Cordano, Joseph DeRosa, Linda Burchik
High capacity disk storage that has lower price per GB as well as relatively lower performance than higher performance disk storage; suitable for low I/O duty applications
Manages 'content' through different stages of its life using policy-driven software automation; assigns data to least expensive storage device without compromising service
A pool is a homogeneous group of storage hardware that meets service level requirements for access to data with a certain level of capital and management intensity; target of ILM process
What is Maxtor's go-to-market strategy for the midline category?
How can Maxtor influence creation of midline category without looking self-interested in pushing drives?
notes: Key strategic tension: vendor-driven category creation risk

metric_value: Seagate wants to protect its dominance in FC disk market; will be reluctant to compete aggressively in midline market
WD does not have extensive experience selling to 'business'; sells products not solutions
notes: WD assessed as product-focused not solution-focused

metric_value: Hitachi Global Storage focuses on 'right product at right time'; product and technology focus rather than business solutions
TCO (budget fit); ROI (net positive IT savings); Business value to end users; Competitive advantage
notes: Four-level storage buying justification model from Aberdeen

metric_value: Take market share from competitors by being externally focused; establish basis for sustainable competitive advantage beyond price
Literal messaging: functions and features; Experiential messaging: emotional responses and problem solutions
What is the most credible threat to the emergence of the midline category?
Which competitors are friends and which are enemies regarding creation of midline category?
notes: Ecosystem framing: some competitors benefit from category creation

metric_value: Focus on maximizing time-to-market and ROI in Q2-Q3 2004 for target audience segments
Academic journals; advertising; analyst white papers; conferences; decision tools; industry associations; trade shows; trade press; Wall Street; webinars; web site
Reducing capital costs; improving return on capital; aligning to business policy; synchronized expansion with storage growth requirements
Refining the message; reaching agreement; giving the go-ahead
notes: Final workshop session objective — executive sign-off
